reference: Hi, it seems like a developmental delay due to an infection affecting the growing brain during the newborn period. He needs to undergo investigations, including imaging of the brain and some basic blood tests. He will also require regular medications for his seizures.
text: Hi, it seems like a development is delayed due to an infection affecting the growing brain during the growing period. We need to undergo an investigation into the possibility of some sort of growth. We will also require written documentation from the doctor.
